headline: Is Gilead (GILD) One of the Most Undervalued NASDAQ Stocks to Buy Right Now?
summary: Gilead Sciences Inc. (NASDAQ:GILD) is one of the 10 Most Undervalued NASDAQ Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 25, Gilead Sciences announced FDA approval for Trodelvy as a first-line treatment for metastatic triple-negative breast cancer (mTNBC). It is now approved as a single agent or in combination with Keytruda, becoming the first antibody-drug conjugate […]
